CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2026 Continued To Dec-02-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Moving Defendant Jeannine Deloche's unopposed Motion to Admit Pro Hac Vice Counsel John McDonald is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, counsel John McDonald may appear as counsel pro hac vice for Moving Party in this action.

Moving Party shall prepare a proposed order which repeats the above text verbatim and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

No proposed order received. Moving party failed to provide and follow the court's order.

Counsel for the Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections To Plaintiff'S Request For Production, Set One
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Plaintiff Vahid Amani's Motion To Compel Defendant Jeannine Deloche To Provide Amended, Objection Free Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $4,000.00 is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Defendant is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Two proposed orders are submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Jeannine Deloche To Provide Amended, Objection Free Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents (Set One) And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $4,000.00
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Defendant Jeannine Deloche's Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections To Plaintiff's Request For Production, Set One is GRANTED.

For the reasons set out in the order on the companion motion set for hearing today, this motion is granted. The record showing Defendant served responses and her failure to serve timely responses was the result of excusable neglect and mistake, the court relieves Defendant from waiver. (Code of Civil Procedure section 2031.300(a); Sinaiko Healthcare Consulting, Inc. v. Pacific Healthcare Consultants (2007) 148 Cal.App.4th 390, 403.)

Defendant is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Two proposed orders are submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Defendant Wells Fargo Securities, LLC's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is DENIED.
